board.heading: Recent demand worth investigating
board.intro: Ponte identifies recent indications of buyer demand and seller availability through external market research. These are not verified opportunities. Ask Ponte to establish who is behind a signal, whether it is still current, and whether a qualified introduction can be arranged.
board.empty: Selected signals are being reviewed. Nothing is shown here until an administrator has approved it for display.

detail.unknownHeading: What Ponte has not yet established

unknowns.u1: Who is behind the requirement or offer
unknowns.u2: The company and its authority to transact
unknowns.u3: Whether the requirement or offer is still current
unknowns.u4: Whether the participant is willing to be introduced

detail.tombstone: This market signal is no longer active.

cta.secondarySupply: I may be able to supply this
cta.secondaryBuy: I may be interested in buying this

investigate.intro: Ponte will look into the requirement behind this signal. Your request goes to the Ponte desk; no third party is contacted or revealed automatically.
investigate.goalLabel: What do you want Ponte to establish?
investigate.goalPlaceholder: e.g. who is behind this, whether it is still current, whether a qualified introduction can be arranged
investigate.indicativeLabel: Indicative quantity, timing or supply capability
investigate.indicativePlaceholder: e.g. can supply 3 x 40ft/month from March
investigate.geographyPlaceholder: Where you are, or the corridor you serve
investigate.evidenceLabel: Certifications or evidence you can provide
investigate.evidencePlaceholder: e.g. ISO 22000, phytosanitary certs, bank reference
investigate.introCheckbox: I would like a qualified introduction if Ponte confirms the requirement.
